headerDisplay: Control Toshiba REGZA TVs via REGZA App Connect. v0.7.2 improves operation-wake safety, mute restoration, and HomeKit accessory identity stability. REGZA 55J10X is verified with HTTPS port 4430.
footerDisplay: After changing settings, restart Homebridge. For REGZA 55J10X, choose model=55J10X and enter IP, username, and password.

model.title: REGZA Model Profile
model.description: Model profiles apply tested defaults such as protocol, port, power keys, and certificate handling. Choose Custom to manually configure everything.

mac.title: MAC Address for Wake on LAN / Identity
mac.description: Optional. Used for stable HomeKit identity and Wake on LAN only when enableWakeOnLan=true.

allowSelfSignedCertificate.title: Allow Self-Signed TV Certificate
allowSelfSignedCertificate.description: Keep enabled for REGZA HTTPS port 4430, which uses a TV Web Interface private CA certificate.

powerMode.title: Power Control Mode
powerMode.description: Use separate ON/OFF keys when supported. This matches HomeKit behavior better than a toggle key.

powerOnKey.title: Power ON Key
powerOnKey.description: REGZA remote key used for Power ON in discrete mode. Verified on 55J10X.

powerOffKey.title: Power OFF Key
powerOffKey.description: REGZA remote key used for Power OFF in discrete mode. Verified on 55J10X.

powerToggleKey.title: Power Toggle Key
powerToggleKey.description: REGZA power toggle key used in toggle mode, and kept as a fallback for older configurations.

powerKey.title: Legacy Power Key
powerKey.description: Deprecated. Use Power Toggle Key instead. Existing v0.1.x configs continue to work.

enableWakeOnLan.title: Enable Wake on LAN Before Power Key
enableWakeOnLan.description: Normally disabled for 55J10X because the HTTPS remote power key can toggle from standby.

pollingInterval.title: Polling Interval Seconds
pollingInterval.description: Polls the REGZA v2 API for power/input and mute status. Verified on 55J10X.

enableMutePowerProbe.title: Enable Mute-based Power Probe
enableMutePowerProbe.description: Legacy master switch. Keep enabled and select the behavior with Power Probe Mode.

powerProbeMode.title: Power Probe Mode
powerProbeMode.description: Operation-linked mode avoids frequent mute probes. It sends discrete Power ON before supported operations after a short idle period and runs one mute probe after a configurable long idle period.

powerProbeInterval.title: Power Probe Interval Seconds
powerProbeInterval.description: Used only in Periodic mode. Interval for checking an ambiguous HDMI/standby state.

operationPowerOnThresholdSeconds.title: Operation Wake Threshold Seconds
operationPowerOnThresholdSeconds.description: Discrete power mode only. Before a broadcast, volume, or mute operation, send the Power ON key when no user operation has occurred for this duration. Set 0 to always send it.

stalePowerProbeHours.title: Stale State Probe Hours
stalePowerProbeHours.description: After this many hours without a user operation, run one reversible mute probe and update HomeKit. This detects power OFF performed with another remote.

operationCommandDelayMs.title: Operation Command Delay Milliseconds
operationCommandDelayMs.description: Delay between a preparatory Power ON or mute-probe command and the requested operation.

selectKeyMode.title: First Select Button Action
selectKeyMode.description: Controls the first HomeKit Select press. Back, Exit, Power OFF or timeout resets it.

navigationTimeoutSeconds.title: Navigation Mode Timeout Seconds
navigationTimeoutSeconds.description: After this period without navigation input, the next Select press opens the configured menu again.

navigationPostSelectResetSeconds.title: Guide Auto-close Delay Seconds
navigationPostSelectResetSeconds.description: After a normal Select inside the guide/menu, send Back and close it after this delay. Additional arrows or Select presses restart the timer.

contextualRemoteArrows.title: Contextual Arrow Buttons
contextualRemoteArrows.description: Outside navigation mode: Up/Down change channel; Right cycles terrestrial → BS → CS and Left cycles in reverse. Inside the guide/menu they behave as normal arrows.

keyMap.title: Key Map Overrides
keyMap.description: Optional command name to REGZA hex key mapping, e.g. {"volumeUp":"40BF1A"}.
